It imports `View` from `react-native` and immediately exports it as the default export. The source map comment is standard for debugging purposes.\n\n---\n\n### Confirming if issues are present:\n- **Issue presence:** No. The code is standard, with no signs of malicious activity, obfuscation, or security risks.\n\n### Flaws or mistakes:\n- **Errors or flaws:** None.
